full_text:
Lady Bo 白皇后
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Bo (白皇后). In 215, nearly executed for her husband’s crimes but let off as marriage was recent. Lady Bo was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
